questions.question_text: A company needs to store backups that are accessed only once per quarter but must be retrievable within 1 hour at the lowest possible cost. Which Amazon S3 storage class should they use?
Which AWS service provides a fully managed, petabyte-scale data warehouse that allows you to run complex analytical queries on structured data?
According to the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, which of the following is the sole responsibility of the customer? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Patching the guest operating system of an EC2 instance
Securing the physical data center facilities
Managing user access permissions via IAM policies
correct_answers: Patching the guest operating system of an EC2 instance
Managing user access permissions via IAM policies

questions.question_text: Which AWS service allows you to retrieve compliance reports such as SOC, PCI, and ISO certifications on demand?
A web application experiences unpredictable traffic spikes. The company wants to automatically add or remove EC2 instances based on CPU utilization. Which AWS service should they use?
Which AWS support plan includes a designated Technical Account Manager (TAM) and provides a 15-minute response time for business-critical system down issues?
You need to store frequently accessed data that requires very low latency and high IOPS for a NoSQL database. Which AWS service is most suitable?
Which of the following are valid pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Select TWO.)
A company wants to establish a dedicated, private, and consistent network connection from its on-premises data center to AWS, bypassing the public internet. Which service should they use?
Which Amazon EC2 pricing model offers the largest discount (up to 90% off On-Demand) but can be interrupted by AWS with a two-minute notice?
Which S3 storage class is designed for long-term archival with the lowest storage cost, but requires retrieval time of 12 hours or more?
Under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, which task is the responsibility of AWS?
possible_answers: Encrypting application data stored in an S3 bucket
Configuring security groups to restrict traffic
Patching the operating system of an EC2 instance
Maintaining the physical security of data centers
correct_answers: Maintaining the physical security of data centers

questions.question_text: Which AWS service allows you to run code without provisioning or managing servers, and you pay only for the compute time you consume?
Which of the following AWS services is used to monitor and log API calls made within your AWS account for auditing and security analysis?

A company needs to transfer 50 TB of data from its on-premises data center to AWS, but the internet connection is slow and unreliable. Which AWS service is most cost-effective for this offline data transfer?
Which component of the AWS Global Infrastructure is a physical location with one or more data centers, each with redundant power, networking, and connectivity?
Which AWS service helps you protect against Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks at no additional cost for all AWS customers?
A company wants to provide its employees with virtual Windows or Linux desktops in the cloud, accessible from any device. Which AWS service should they use?
Which AWS service allows you to create a private, logically isolated virtual network in the cloud, where you can launch AWS resources?
You need to store infrequently accessed data that can be recreated if lost, and you want the lowest possible storage cost. Which S3 storage class should you choose?
Which AWS service provides a fully managed, scalable DNS service that can route end users to internet applications?
Under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, which of the following is a shared control between AWS and the customer?
possible_answers: Awareness and training of security best practices
correct_answers: Awareness and training of security best practices

questions.question_text: Which AWS service automatically analyzes your AWS environment and provides recommendations to help you follow AWS best practices across five categories: cost optimization, performance, security, fault tolerance, and service limits?
A company needs to store objects that are accessed very rarely (once or twice per year) but must be retrieved within minutes when requested. Which S3 storage class is most cost-effective?
Which AWS service allows you to create and manage encryption keys for your AWS services and applications?
Which of the following are benefits of moving from an on-premises data center to the AWS Cloud? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Trade capital expense for variable expense
correct_answers: Trade capital expense for variable expense

questions.question_text: Which AWS service is a fully managed NoSQL database that supports key-value and document data models and provides single-digit millisecond latency at any scale?

You are designing a highly available application and want to ensure that if one Availability Zone fails, your application continues to run. What is the minimum number of Availability Zones you should deploy across?
Which AWS service can be used to send notifications (email, SMS, or HTTP) to subscribers when a specific event occurs, such as a CloudWatch alarm being triggered?
A company wants to run containerized applications on AWS without managing the underlying servers. Which serverless compute option should they choose?
Which AWS support plan provides access to the AWS Support API, 24/7 access to Cloud Support Engineers, and a 1-hour response time for production system down issues?
Which AWS service is used to create and manage infrastructure as code, allowing you to provision AWS resources using templates?
A company needs a storage solution for a shared file system that can be accessed by multiple EC2 instances concurrently, and the data is accessed frequently. Which service should they use?
Which of the following is the responsibility of the customer under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Securing network traffic within VPC using security groups
Patching the host operating system of RDS instances
Managing data encryption at rest for S3 objects
Patching the hypervisor of EC2 hosts
correct_answers: Securing network traffic within VPC using security groups
Managing data encryption at rest for S3 objects

questions.question_text: Which AWS service helps you continuously monitor and improve the security of your EC2 instances by performing automated vulnerability assessments?
A company plans to run a steady-state workload for 3 years. Which EC2 purchasing option provides the largest discount and also reserves capacity?
Which AWS service allows you to build conversational interfaces (chatbots) for your applications using voice and text?
Which of the following is a benefit of using AWS Organizations' consolidated billing feature? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Volume discounts are shared across all accounts
Each account receives a separate bill
One bill is generated for multiple accounts
Security policies are automatically applied to all accounts
Data transfer between accounts is always free
correct_answers: Volume discounts are shared across all accounts
One bill is generated for multiple accounts

questions.question_text: A company needs to store data that is accessed unpredictably, with changing access patterns. Which S3 storage class automatically moves data between access tiers to optimize costs?
Which AWS service is used to decouple application components by allowing you to send, store, and receive messages between software components at any volume?
Which of the following is an advantage of cloud computing compared to on-premises infrastructure?
possible_answers: You must provision resources in advance to avoid capacity issues
You pay only for what you use
You are responsible for racking and stacking servers
You have to manage power and cooling
correct_answers: You pay only for what you use

questions.question_text: Which AWS service allows you to run relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, SQL Server) as a managed service, handling backups, patching, and replication?
A company wants to migrate its on-premises Oracle database to Amazon Aurora with minimal downtime. Which AWS service should they use?
Which of the following are best practices for securing an AWS root user account? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Use the root user for daily administrative tasks
Share the root user password with team members
Create an IAM user with admin privileges and use that instead
Store root user access keys in code repositories
correct_answers: Create an IAM user with admin privileges and use that instead

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fast, in-memory caching solution that improves performance for read-heavy database workloads?
Which component of a VPC acts as a virtual firewall for one or more EC2 instances, controlling inbound and outbound traffic at the instance level?
A company needs to store data that is accessed frequently but requires retrieval in milliseconds. Which EBS volume type is best suited for high-performance OLTP databases?
Which AWS service allows you to automate the deployment and scaling of web applications without managing the underlying infrastructure, similar to Platform as a Service (PaaS)?
Which of the following are components of the AWS Global Infrastructure? (Select TWO.)
Which AWS service helps you track and visualize costs and usage over time, forecast future spending, and identify cost-saving opportunities?
A company wants to set custom spending limits and receive alerts when their AWS costs exceed a certain threshold. Which service should they use?

Which of the following are design principles of the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Select TWO.)

possible_answers: Amazon MSK (Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka)
correct_answers: Amazon MSK (Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka)

questions.question_text: A company needs to store a boot volume for a Windows EC2 instance that requires high IOPS for database transactions. Which storage type should they use?
Which AWS service provides a fully managed, serverless data integration service that makes it easy to discover, prepare, and combine data for analytics and machine learning?
Which of the following is true about AWS Free Tier?
possible_answers: All AWS services are always free for the first 12 months
Some services offer always-free usage within certain limits
You must pay a subscription fee to access the Free Tier
The Free Tier only applies to EC2 instances
correct_answers: Some services offer always-free usage within certain limits

questions.question_text: A company wants to ensure that its S3 bucket is not publicly accessible. Which feature should they enable?
Which AWS service is used to store and retrieve secrets such as database credentials, API keys, and other sensitive information, with automatic rotation capabilities?
Which of the following are benefits of using AWS CloudFormation? (Select TWO.)

Which AWS service provides a scalable, serverless event bus that connects applications using events from AWS services, SaaS, and custom applications?

A company needs to run a high-performance computing (HPC) workload that requires very fast, ephemeral block storage. Which storage option provides the highest IOPS but data is lost if the instance is stopped?
Which AWS service helps you protect against SQL injection and cross-site scripting attacks by filtering web traffic based on rules?
Which of the following statements best describes the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) Governance perspective?
possible_answers: Focuses on managing user access and identities
Focuses on ensuring that cloud investments accelerate business outcomes
Focuses on orchestrating cloud operations and ensuring compliance
Focuses on designing and implementing cloud architecture
correct_answers: Focuses on orchestrating cloud operations and ensuring compliance

questions.question_text: Which Amazon EC2 pricing model allows you to change instance attributes (family, operating system, tenancy) during the term, making it suitable for flexible workloads?
A company needs to store data that is accessed once per month and requires retrieval within 1 minute. Which S3 storage class is the most cost-effective?
Which AWS service provides a fully managed service for running containerized applications using Kubernetes, without having to manage the control plane?
Which of the following are responsibilities of AWS under the Shared Responsibility Model? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Protecting the global infrastructure (data centers, hardware)
Patching the guest operating system of EC2 instances
Encrypting data stored in S3 buckets by default
correct_answers: Protecting the global infrastructure (data centers, hardware)

questions.question_text: Which AWS service is used to monitor the health and performance of your AWS resources, collect metrics, set alarms, and visualize logs?
A company wants to quickly estimate the cost of running a specific set of AWS resources before deployment. Which tool should they use?
Which of the following is a valid use case for Amazon S3? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Storing and retrieving any amount of data as objects
correct_answers: Storing and retrieving any amount of data as objects

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, highly available, and scalable file system that can be accessed by multiple EC2 instances concurrently using the NFS protocol?
possible_answers: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server

possible_answers: Increased fault tolerance and high availability
Elimination of the need for load balancing

correct_answers: It is a petabyte-scale data transport solution
